g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain what Spring Security filters do in this architecture')
sendPrompt('Explain what a Spring Boot controller does')
sendPrompt('Explain what the GrantController should handle')
sendPrompt('Why include a health endpoint in your service?')
sendPrompt('What should AuthService be responsible for?')
sendPrompt('What should GrantService be responsible for?')
sendPrompt('What does a Spring Data JPA repository do?')
sendPrompt('How does Spring Data JPA connect to PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('How does Spring @Scheduled work for background jobs?')
